mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO evd_task_evidence_resolution ( resolution_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, configuration_bundle_id, configuration_bundle_digest, stage_code, source_event_id, source_event_digest, resolver_version, condition_input_digest, resolution_explanation, generation_no, condition_fact_type, condition_fact_ref, condition_fact_revision, previous_resolution_id, slot_count, resolved_at) VALUES (#{resolutionId}, #{tenantId}, #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{bundleId}, #{bundleDigest}, #{stageCode}, #{sourceEventId}, #{sourceEventDigest}, #{resolverVersion}, #{conditionInputDigest}, CAST(#{resolutionExplanation} AS jsonb), #{generationNo}, #{conditionFactType}, #{conditionFactRef}, #{conditionFactRevision},
CAST(#{previousResolutionId} AS uuid) NULL , #{slotCount}, #{resolvedAt})

INSERT INTO evd_evidence_slot ( slot_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, resolution_id, template_version_id, template_key, template_version, template_digest, requirement_code, occurrence_key, requirement_name, media_type, required_flag, min_count, max_count, condition_input_digest, resolution_explanation, requirement_definition, requirement_digest, status_projection, resolved_at, slot_generation, supersedes_slot_id) VALUES
(CAST(#{slot.slotId} AS uuid), #{slot.tenantId}, CAST(#{slot.projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slot.taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slot.resolutionId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slot.templateVersionId} AS uuid), #{slot.templateKey}, #{slot.templateVersion}, #{slot.templateDigest}, #{slot.requirementCode}, #{slot.occurrenceKey}, #{slot.requirementName}, #{slot.mediaType}, #{slot.required}, #{slot.minCount}, #{slot.maxCount}, #{slot.conditionInputDigest}, CAST(#{slot.explanation} AS jsonb), CAST(#{slot.definition} AS jsonb), #{slot.requirementDigest}, #{slot.status}, #{slot.resolvedAt}, #{slot.slotGeneration},
CAST(#{slot.supersedesSlotId} AS uuid) NULL )

INSERT INTO evd_evidence_resolution_member ( member_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, resolution_id, template_version_id, requirement_code, occurrence_key, condition_result, active_slot_id, previous_slot_id, transition, required_disposition, counting_item_count, condition_input_digest, resolution_explanation, created_at) VALUES
(CAST(#{member.memberId} AS uuid), #{member.tenantId}, CAST(#{member.projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{member.taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{member.resolutionId} AS uuid), CAST(#{member.templateVersionId} AS uuid), #{member.requirementCode}, #{member.occurrenceKey}, #{member.conditionResult},
CAST(#{member.activeSlotId} AS uuid) NULL ,
CAST(#{member.previousSlotId} AS uuid) NULL , #{member.transition}, #{member.requiredDisposition}, #{member.countingItemCount}, #{member.conditionInputDigest}, CAST(#{member.explanation} AS jsonb), #{member.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM evd_task_evidence_resolution WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid)

WITH latest AS ( SELECT resolution_id, generation_no FROM evd_task_evidence_resolution WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) ORDER BY generation_no DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT slot.slot_id AS "slotId", slot.resolution_id AS "resolutionId", slot.task_id AS "taskId", slot.project_id AS "projectId", slot.template_version_id AS "templateVersionId", slot.template_key AS "templateKey", slot.template_version AS "templateVersion", slot.template_digest AS "templateDigest", slot.requirement_code AS "requirementCode", slot.occurrence_key AS "occurrenceKey", slot.requirement_name AS "requirementName", slot.media_type AS "mediaType", slot.required_flag AS "required", slot.min_count AS "minCount", slot.max_count AS "maxCount", member.condition_input_digest AS "conditionInputDigest", member.resolution_explanation::text AS "explanation", slot.requirement_definition::text AS "definition", slot.requirement_digest AS "requirementDigest", slot.status_projection AS "status", slot.resolved_at AS "resolvedAt", slot.slot_generation AS "slotGeneration", slot.supersedes_slot_id AS "supersedesSlotId", member.resolution_id AS "currentResolutionId", resolution.generation_no AS "resolutionGeneration", true AS "active", member.transition AS "transition", member.required_disposition AS "requiredDisposition" FROM latest JOIN evd_evidence_resolution_member member ON member.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND member.task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) JOIN evd_task_evidence_resolution resolution ON resolution.tenant_id = member.tenant_id AND resolution.resolution_id = member.resolution_id AND member.condition_result = true JOIN evd_evidence_slot slot ON slot.tenant_id = member.tenant_id AND slot.slot_id = member.active_slot_id ORDER BY slot.template_key, slot.template_version, slot.requirement_code, slot.occurrence_key, slot.slot_id

WITH latest AS ( SELECT resolution_id, generation_no FROM evd_task_evidence_resolution WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) ORDER BY generation_no DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT slot.slot_id AS "slotId", slot.resolution_id AS "resolutionId", slot.task_id AS "taskId", slot.project_id AS "projectId", slot.template_version_id AS "templateVersionId", slot.template_key AS "templateKey", slot.template_version AS "templateVersion", slot.template_digest AS "templateDigest", slot.requirement_code AS "requirementCode", slot.occurrence_key AS "occurrenceKey", slot.requirement_name AS "requirementName", slot.media_type AS "mediaType", slot.required_flag AS "required", slot.min_count AS "minCount", slot.max_count AS "maxCount", member.condition_input_digest AS "conditionInputDigest", member.resolution_explanation::text AS "explanation", slot.requirement_definition::text AS "definition", slot.requirement_digest AS "requirementDigest", CASE WHEN member.condition_result THEN slot.status_projection ELSE 'REVIEW_REQUIRED' END AS "status", slot.resolved_at AS "resolvedAt", slot.slot_generation AS "slotGeneration", slot.supersedes_slot_id AS "supersedesSlotId", member.resolution_id AS "currentResolutionId", latest.generation_no AS "resolutionGeneration", member.condition_result AS "active", member.transition AS "transition", member.required_disposition AS "requiredDisposition" FROM latest JOIN evd_evidence_resolution_member member ON member.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND member.resolution_id = latest.resolution_id LEFT JOIN evd_evidence_condition_disposition disposition ON disposition.tenant_id = member.tenant_id AND disposition.member_id = member.member_id JOIN evd_evidence_slot slot ON slot.tenant_id = member.tenant_id AND slot.slot_id = COALESCE(member.active_slot_id, member.previous_slot_id) WHERE (member.resolution_id = latest.resolution_id AND member.condition_result = true) OR (member.required_disposition = 'REVIEW_REQUIRED' AND disposition.member_id IS NULL) ORDER BY slot.template_key, slot.template_version, slot.requirement_code, slot.occurrence_key, slot.slot_id

SELECT resolution_id AS "resolutionId", generation_no AS "generationNo", condition_fact_revision AS "conditionFactRevision" FROM evd_task_evidence_resolution WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) ORDER BY generation_no DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT member.member_id AS "memberId", member.template_version_id AS "templateVersionId", member.requirement_code AS "requirementCode", member.occurrence_key AS "occurrenceKey", member.condition_result AS "conditionResult", member.active_slot_id AS "activeSlotId", member.previous_slot_id AS "previousSlotId", COALESCE(slot.slot_generation, previous.slot_generation, 0) AS "slotGeneration", member.required_disposition AS "requiredDisposition", disposition.decision AS "dispositionDecision" FROM evd_evidence_resolution_member member LEFT JOIN evd_evidence_slot slot ON slot.tenant_id = member.tenant_id AND slot.slot_id = member.active_slot_id LEFT JOIN evd_evidence_slot previous ON previous.tenant_id = member.tenant_id AND previous.slot_id = member.previous_slot_id LEFT JOIN evd_evidence_condition_disposition disposition ON disposition.tenant_id = member.tenant_id AND disposition.member_id = member.member_id WHERE member.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND member.resolution_id = CAST(#{resolutionId} AS uuid) ORDER BY member.template_version_id, member.requirement_code, member.occurrence_key

SELECT count(*) FROM evd_evidence_resolution_member member LEFT JOIN evd_evidence_condition_disposition disposition ON disposition.tenant_id = member.tenant_id AND disposition.member_id = member.member_id WHERE member.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND member.task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) AND member.required_disposition = 'REVIEW_REQUIRED' AND disposition.member_id IS NULL

SELECT member.member_id AS "memberId", member.resolution_id AS "resolutionId", member.task_id AS "taskId", member.project_id AS "projectId", member.previous_slot_id AS "slotId" FROM evd_evidence_resolution_member member LEFT JOIN evd_evidence_condition_disposition disposition ON disposition.tenant_id = member.tenant_id AND disposition.member_id = member.member_id WHERE member.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND member.resolution_id = CAST(#{resolutionId} AS uuid) AND member.previous_slot_id = CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid) AND member.required_disposition = 'REVIEW_REQUIRED' AND disposition.member_id IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_evidence_condition_disposition ( disposition_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, resolution_id, member_id, slot_id, decision, reason_code, review_ref, decided_by, decided_at, request_digest) VALUES (CAST(#{dispositionId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{resolutionId} AS uuid), CAST(#{memberId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid), #{decision}, #{reasonCode}, #{reviewRef}, #{decidedBy}, #{decidedAt}, #{requestDigest})
mapper.select: SELECT disposition_id AS "dispositionId", tenant_id AS "tenantId", project_id AS "projectId", task_id AS "taskId", resolution_id AS "resolutionId", member_id AS "memberId", slot_id AS "slotId", decision AS "decision", reason_code AS "reasonCode", review_ref AS "reviewRef", decided_by AS "decidedBy", decided_at AS "decidedAt", request_digest AS "requestDigest" FROM evd_evidence_condition_disposition WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND member_id = CAST(#{memberId} AS uuid)

SELECT disposition_id AS "dispositionId", tenant_id AS "tenantId", project_id AS "projectId", task_id AS "taskId", resolution_id AS "resolutionId", member_id AS "memberId", slot_id AS "slotId", decision AS "decision", reason_code AS "reasonCode", review_ref AS "reviewRef", decided_by AS "decidedBy", decided_at AS "decidedAt", request_digest AS "requestDigest" FROM evd_evidence_condition_disposition WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND disposition_id = CAST(#{dispositionId} AS uuid)
